powpow/net/tcp.nim — Non-blocking TCP server and client connections.

Built on top of the powpow event loop for zero-threading, high-throughput TCP networking. Platform-agnostic: IOCP (Windows) or epoll/kqueue (Unix).

Imports

../loop, ../types, common

Types

Connection = ref object
  fd*: SocketHandle
  loop*: Loop
  server*: TcpServer
  state*: ConnState
  clientIp*: string
  sendFileFd*: int
  sendFileOff*: int64
  sendFileRemain*: int64
  data*: pointer
ConnState = enum
  Connecting, Connected, Closing, Closed
OnAccept = proc (conn: Connection) {.closure.}
OnClose = proc (conn: Connection) {.closure.}
OnData = proc (conn: Connection; data: openArray[byte]) {.closure.}
TcpServer = ref object
  fd*: SocketHandle
  loop*: Loop
  onClose*: OnClose
  connPool*: seq[Connection]
  maxConnections*: int

Consts

MaxBufPoolSize = 1024
MaxConnPoolSize = 1024

Procs

proc close(conn: Connection) {....raises: [KeyError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc close(server: TcpServer) {....raises: [KeyError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc closeAfterDrain(conn: Connection) {....raises: [KeyError], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
proc closeAndRelease(conn: Connection) {....raises: [KeyError], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
proc connect(loop: Loop; address: string; port: int;
             onConnect: proc (conn: Connection) {.closure.}; onData: OnData;
             onClose: OnClose = nil) {....raises: [NetError, KeyError, OSError,
    Exception], tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
proc continueSendFile(conn: Connection): bool {....raises: [KeyError], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Resume an in-progress zero-copy file send when the socket becomes writable. Drains as much data as possible per edge-triggered Write event. Returns true when the send is complete (or error), false if more Write events needed. 
proc injectFd(server: TcpServer; clientFd: SocketHandle) {.
    ...raises: [Exception, KeyError, OSError], tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
proc listen(server: TcpServer; address: string; port: int) {.
    ...raises: [NetError, KeyError, OSError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc listenUnix(server: TcpServer; path: string; mode: int = 0o000000000660) {.
    ...raises: [NetError, KeyError, OSError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc newConnection(fd: SocketHandle; loop: Loop; server: TcpServer;
                   readBuf: ptr UncheckedArray[byte]; readBufLen: int): Connection {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc newTcpServer(loop: Loop; onData: OnData; onAccept: OnAccept = nil;
                  onClose: OnClose = nil): TcpServer {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
proc send(conn: Connection; data: openArray[byte]): int {.
    ...raises: [KeyError, OSError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc send(conn: Connection; data: string): int {....raises: [KeyError, OSError],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc sendv(conn: Connection;
           parts: openArray[tuple[data: ptr UncheckedArray[byte], len: int]]): int {.
    ...raises: [KeyError, OSError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc shutdown(conn: Connection) {....raises: [KeyError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
